name: Growth
champions_effect: Boosts the user's Attack and Sp. Atk stats by 1 stage. In harsh sunlight these stats will be boosted by 2 stages instead.

name: Crabhammer
champions_effect: This move has a 1-stage Critical-Hit Ratio Boost.

name: Bone Rush
champions_effect: The user attacks 2 to 5 times in a row.

name: Iron Head
champions_effect: Has a 20% chance of making the target flinch.

name: Night Daze
champions_effect: Has a 40% chance of lowering the target's accuracy by 1 stage.

name: Moonblast
champions_effect: Has a 10% chance of lowering the target's Sp. Atk stat by 1 stage.

name: First Impression
champions_effect: This move fails unless it is the first move used by the user after it enters a battle.

name: Spirit Shackle
champions_effect: Gives the target the Can't Escape status.

name: Fire Lash
champions_effect: Lowers the target's Defense stat by 1 stage.

name: Trop Kick
champions_effect: Lowers the target's Attack stat by 1 stage.

name: Beak Blast
champions_effect: If the user is hit by a contact move before it uses this move the attacker will be burned.

name: Snap Trap
champions_effect: Gives the target the Bound status.

name: Apple Acid
champions_effect: Lowers the target's Sp. Def stat by 1 stage.

name: Grav Apple
champions_effect: Lowers the target's Defense stat by 1 stage. This move's power is boosted by 50% when the Gravity status is active.

name: Dire Claw
champions_effect: Has a 30% chance of leaving the target poisoned paralyzed or asleep.

name: Psyshield Bash
champions_effect: Boosts the user's Defense stat by 1 stage.

name: Mountain Gale
champions_effect: Has a 30% chance of making the target flinch.

name: Infernal Parade
champions_effect: Has a 30% chance of burning the target. This move's power is doubled if the target has a status condition.

name: Revival Blessing
champions_effect: Revives a Pokémon in the user's party that has fainted and restores 1/2 of that Pokémon's max HP.

name: Double Shock
champions_effect: The user loses the Electric type. This move fails unless it is used by an Electric type.

name: Syrup Bomb
champions_effect: Gives the target the Syrupy status for 3 turns.
